prompt:
A notebook open to a verification checklist page, with a small tablet-like device in soft focus showing abstract status indicators (no readable UI text). Next to the notebook are a short ethernet cable, a tiny padlock icon charm, and a compact multitool—suggesting a secure HTTPS service check without any legible output.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 in a clean near-future ops workstation: soft cinematic lighting, minimal clutter, no logos, no readable text, no overlays. Make the notebook and “checklist” vibe the unmistakable focal point.
